requirements.description: Strong proficiency in C# and .NET for backend application development.
Experience designing and implementing RESTful APIs.
Experience with relational databases such as SQL Server and data modeling.
Understanding of software architecture principles and design patterns.
Experience with version control systems such as Git in collaborative environments.
Experience working in agile development environments (Scrum or Kanban).
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.
Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving skills.
Experience integrating external APIs and third-party services.
Knowledge of cloud platforms such as Microsoft Azure or AWS.
Experience with containerization technologies such as Docker and orchestration tools like Kubernetes.
Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and automated deployment processes.
Basic understanding of frontend technologies such as Angular or React.
Strong communication skills and ability to work effectively in cross-functional teams.
Experience performing code reviews and applying clean code principles.
Understanding of scalable system design and performance optimization.
